request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local community group - our town's emergency preparedness budget got cut again, but did you know most of the money was going to outdated systems? A neighbor who volunteers with the fire department says we'd be better off with modern, community-based preparedness programs. It's not about being scared, it's about smart, practical safety that actually helps people. #CommunityFirst #SafetyOverBureaucracy
